creator: cvs-src@yandex.ru
text:
This upstream patch works for me:
http://bazaar.launchpad.net/~jelmer/bzr/fix-i18n/revision/6026

We can place patch attached into devel/bazaar-ng/files until bzr 2.5 
(that contains this fix) will not be released.

-- 
Regards,
Ruslan

Tinderboxing kills... the drives.
